volley.name: Volley
volley.blurb: Burst damage to all enemies near you.

concussion.name: Concussion Blast
concussion.blurb: Splash + short slow — clears ground swarms.

overcharge.name: Overcharge
overcharge.blurb: Massive shot into the toughest foe in range.

sky_burst.name: Sky Burst
sky_burst.blurb: Anti-air pulse. Hits flyers near you.
